---
title: "transieve"
subtitle: "Transit-signal analysis in correlated noise"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::{.hero-banner}
**transieve** is a research package for detecting single-transit events in stellar light curves,
combining empirical transit models, Gaussian-process noise modelling, and matched-filter diagnostics.
:::

## Features

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-4}
### Transit Modelling
Empirical and limb-darkened transit models via `batman`, with a validated `LightCurve` container and synthetic light-curve generation.
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
### GP Noise Modelling
Fit SHO and exponential GP families with `celerite2`. Characterise correlated noise and assess hyperparameter stability with 2D scan maps.
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
### Matched-Filter Detection
Exact GP-inverse matched filtering with white-noise baselines. Evaluate Z-scores, recovery fractions, and detectability depth over template banks.
:::

:::

## Installation

Clone the repository and install in editable mode:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/dgegen/transieve.git
cd transieve
uv sync
```

## Learn more

- [GP Noise Modelling tutorial](tutorials/gp_visualisation.py) — visualise kernel structure and matched-filter calibration
- [Retrievability Demo](tutorials/retrievability_synthetic_demo.py) — end-to-end recovery assessment on synthetic data
- [API Reference](reference/index.qmd) — full documentation of all public classes and functions
